title: Fire Apparatus Replacement Program: Decades of Deferred Maintenance Nearly Resolved
summary: Fire Chief explains apparatus replacement history — decades of deferred maintenance created a 14-truck deficit across engines and ladders. Over the last 8 years, systematic purchasing has nearly closed the gap. Current request (items 20-21) for one ladder truck, plus planned two-engine purchase next year, will bring the program to full compliance with no further deficiencies. End-of-life trucks auctioned. Meeting adjourns after this discussion.
